# GitHub Launch Checklist

Use this right before publishing the repository.

## Repo Settings

- [ ] Set repository description
- [ ] Add topics: `python`, `asyncio`, `websocket`, `trading`, `observability`, `pytest`
- [ ] Set visibility to Public
- [ ] Pin repository on profile

## README / Docs

- [ ] README renders correctly
- [ ] `PROJECT_SUMMARY.md` is present
- [ ] Architecture note is present
- [ ] Incident case write-up is present

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets in tracked files
- [ ] No private infra details in docs/comments
- [ ] `.env` is not tracked

## Optional polish

- [ ] Add `LICENSE`
- [ ] Add CI workflow
- [ ] Add screenshots/diagram later
